The Cost of Manual Planning

Every day without Optimistic costs your business money

Manual route planning isn't just slow — it's expensive. See what changes from the first week.

❌ Without Optimistic

The daily logistics nightmare

  • ✕Dispatcher spends 40–90 minutes planning routes by hand every morning
  • ✕Drivers take suboptimal paths — fuel and overtime costs spiral
  • ✕Time windows missed — customers complain, reputation suffers
  • ✕No visibility — you don't know where your vehicles actually are
  • ✕Vehicles run at 60–70% capacity — empty space is wasted money
  • ✕One driver calls in sick — the whole day's plan collapses
✓ With Optimistic

The same morning takes 4 minutes

  • ✓Mathematical algorithm builds optimal multi-vehicle routes in seconds
  • ✓Fuel consumption drops up to 20% — measurable savings from the first week
  • ✓Every time window respected — customers receive accurate ETAs automatically
  • ✓Real-time tracking dashboard with instant deviation alerts
  • ✓Load optimisation maximises vehicle capacity on every single run
  • ✓Dynamic re-routing handles any last-minute change in under 60 seconds

Ready to optimise

Mathematical algorithm optimises in under 60 seconds

Our optimisation engine applies over 40 real-world constraints simultaneously — time windows, vehicle loads, driver certifications, fuel type, traffic, and more. Results consistently more efficient than any manual planning.

Under 60 secondsFull optimisation for any fleet size, any number of stops.
40+ constraintsTime windows, capacities, skills, priorities — all respected simultaneously.

One click dispatches optimised routes via the Optimistic mobile app (Android & iOS). Turn-by-turn navigation, stop list, customer details. Customers receive automatic SMS/email ETAs with branded tracking links.

Platform Capabilities

Everything your logistics team needs. All in one platform.

A complete route operations system — not a patchwork of disconnected tools.

Mathematical Route Optimisation Engine
Our proprietary algorithm processes 40+ real-world constraints simultaneously — time windows, vehicle loads, driver certifications, fuel type, hazmat, traffic — producing routes manual dispatching simply cannot match.
40+ constraints
Supported constraint types:
  • Hard & soft time windows
  • Vehicle weight, volume, pallet limits
  • Driver skills & certifications
  • Multi-depot & cross-dock operations
  • Backhaul & pickup-delivery pairs
  • Hazmat routing restrictions
  • Load sequence & freshness priorities
Driver Mobile App
Android & iOS. Turn-by-turn navigation, offline mode, photo & signature proof-of-delivery, barcode scanning. Available in LV, LT, EE, RU, EN.
Works offline
Live Operations Dashboard
Real-time vehicle positions, stop status updates, deviation alerts, ETA recalculations. Full shift replay for post-day analysis.
Customer Notifications
Automatic SMS/email ETAs with branded live tracking links. Reduces inbound calls by over 80%.
Branded tracking
ERP / WMS / SAP / Excel
Full REST API with pre-built connectors for SAP, 1C, Microsoft Dynamics, Oracle, Excel/CSV. Full integration including testing typically takes 1–3 months.
SAP + Excel ready
Analytics & KPI Reports
Cost-per-delivery, fuel, on-time rates, fleet utilisation, planned vs actual. Weekly reports auto-generated. Excel export. GDPR EU data centres.
Dynamic Re-routing
New order? Driver delayed? Re-optimise the remaining workday in seconds without disrupting routes already in progress.
Proof of Delivery
Digital signatures, timestamped photos, barcode scans — captured in the driver app and synced to the dashboard in real time. Fully paperless.
Paperless
For Dispatchers

Your command center. Everything visible at once.

Plan, dispatch, and track every vehicle from a single screen. Real-time deviations, live ETAs, automatic re-routing when the day changes.

Custom Development

Bespoke logistics solutions for complex operations

Beyond the standard platform, Optimistic builds custom route and logistics automation tailored to your specific operation.

Production-Integrated Routing
For manufacturers where production schedules drive delivery sequences. Routes generated automatically from production output — eliminating the gap between factory floor and fleet dispatch. Integrates with any MES or ERP system.
Multi-Tier Distribution Networks
For distributors operating primary (factory to hub) and secondary (hub to customer) transport simultaneously. Our multi-tier optimisation considers the full network to minimise total logistics cost across all tiers.
White-Label Driver & Customer Apps
Custom-branded mobile apps for both drivers and customers, built on Optimistic's routing engine. Your branding, your features, your domain. Full development with ongoing support and roadmap alignment.
Demand Forecasting & Pre-Planning
Historical delivery data combined with external signals (seasonality, weather, events) to predict volume and pre-generate routes. By the time your dispatcher arrives, the plan is already drafted — saving up to 90% of planning effort.
Have a complex logistics challenge?
Tell us about your operation. We'll assess feasibility and propose a solution at no charge.
🏆 #1 Route Optimisation Software in Latvia
About Optimistic

Built by logistics people, for logistics people

Optimistic was founded in Riga, Latvia by a team with deep roots in logistics operations and software development. We saw firsthand how manual route planning was holding Baltic businesses back — and built the tools we wished we had.

Part of the Futech group, we combine over 10 years of Baltic logistics software expertise — route optimisation, GPS fleet management, and logistics analytics — to deliver tools built for the real conditions of our markets. The 200+ figure reflects active clients across the Futech group portfolio.

We know Baltic roads, regulations, ERP systems, and logistics culture. Support in LV, LT, EE, RU, EN.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

What exactly is the Route Audit & Simulation?+
A one-time €1,500 engagement where we take your real routing data — delivery addresses, time windows, vehicle specs, driver constraints — and run it through our mathematical optimisation engine. Within 5 business days you receive a full report showing exactly what you would save in fuel, time, and delivery performance. The fee is credited in full to your subscription if you proceed.
How long does integration take?+
A full integration typically takes 1–3 months, covering ERP/WMS/SAP/Excel connectivity, data migration, constraint configuration, driver app deployment, staff training, and go-live support. This timeline ensures a clean, fully tested system with minimal disruption to your operations. We have completed this process hundreds of times across Baltic and EU markets.
Does Optimistic work with our existing ERP or WMS?+
Yes. Optimistic has a full REST API and pre-built connectors for SAP, 1C, Microsoft Dynamics, Oracle, and Excel/CSV imports. Integration feasibility is assessed during the Route Audit at no extra cost. We've successfully integrated with proprietary WMS, legacy ERP, and custom-built systems across hundreds of client deployments.
How is pricing structured?+
Pricing is based on fleet size — the number of vehicles using the system. We offer monthly and annual plans, with a meaningful discount for annual commitment. For most clients with 10+ vehicles, the full annual cost is recovered within 3–6 months of savings. We share indicative pricing on a call — we don't publish prices online because the right solution depends on your specific operation.
What languages does the driver app support?+
The driver mobile app is available in Latvian, Lithuanian, Estonian, Russian, and English. It works on Android and iOS, supports full offline operation for poor-coverage areas, and requires no special hardware.
Can Optimistic handle our specific constraints?+
Optimistic handles 40+ constraint types including hard and soft time windows, vehicle weight and volume limits, driver certifications, hazmat routing, multi-depot, cold-chain, backhaul, cross-docking, and more. Unusual requirements are assessed during the Route Audit at no extra cost.
Is my delivery data secure and GDPR-compliant?+
Yes. All data is stored in EU-based data centres and processed in full compliance with GDPR. Optimistic maintains appropriate data processing agreements and can provide full documentation for your compliance team. We never share or sell client data.

Ready to see your exact savings figure?

Order the Route Audit. See your real data through our engine. Then decide — with complete information and no obligation.

      API & Integration

      Optimistic / SIA Futech

      Seamless Integration Capabilities

      Optimistic offers seamless integration with various systems including ERPs (SAP, 1C, Microsoft Dynamics, Oracle), CRMs, WMS, and GPS tracking devices. This integration empowers your business to streamline operations, enhance efficiency, accuracy, and overall performance.

      Enhanced Data Synchronisation

      Integrating Optimistic with your ERP or CRM ensures all critical data is synchronised between platforms — client information, addresses, delivery schedules. This eliminates manual data entry and reduces errors, ensuring accurate route planning and execution.

      Real-Time Tracking & Monitoring

      Integration with GPS tracking devices enables real-time fleet monitoring. Combined with route planning, you gain full visibility into vehicle locations, enabling informed decisions, quick adaptation, and accurate customer updates on delivery times.

      Increased Efficiency & Productivity

      Optimistic optimises routes based on client locations, employee availability, and 40+ constraints. By integrating with your ERP or CRM, you can automatically import data, generate optimised routes, and assign tasks — eliminating manual planning.

      Comprehensive Reporting & Analytics

      Leverage the combined power of Optimistic and your ERP/CRM to generate comprehensive reports on route performance, productivity, customer engagement, and more. This data-driven approach enables trend identification and data-backed decisions.

      Scalability & Future-Proofing

      Our integration capabilities are designed to scale with your business. As your technology landscape evolves, the integration with your ERP, CRM, or other systems can easily accommodate changes, keeping operations efficient and optimised.

      Integration Options

      Optimistic offers flexible integration options including full REST API, pre-built connectors for SAP, 1C, Microsoft Dynamics, Oracle, and Excel/CSV imports. Our technical team provides comprehensive guidance and support for establishing a robust and secure integration.

      Ready to integrate? Contact us at info@optimistic.lv or order a Route Audit to assess integration feasibility for your specific systems.

      Privacy Policy

      SIA Futech · Last updated: January 2026

      1. General Provisions

      This Privacy Policy describes how SIA Futech, registration No. 40103853766, legal address: Dzelzavas street 117, Riga, LV-1021 ("Data Controller") collects, processes and stores personal data obtained from customers and visitors of www.optimistic.lv ("Data Subject").

      Personal data means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person. Processing means any operation relating to personal data, such as obtaining, recording, modifying, using, viewing, erasing or destroying it.

      The Data Controller observes data processing principles provided by law and processes personal data in accordance with applicable legislation.

      2. Collection, Processing and Storage

      Personal data is collected, processed and stored primarily through the website and e-mail. By using our services, you agree that information provided is used in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

      The Data Subject is responsible for ensuring personal data submitted is correct, accurate and complete. The Data Controller is not liable for damages caused by incorrectly submitted personal data.

      3. Personal Data We Process

      We may process: name and surname; contact information (email, phone); transaction data (services, delivery address, pricing, payment information); and any other information provided when using our services or contacting us.

      Legal basis: GDPR Article 6(1)(a) consent, (b) contract performance, (c) legal obligation, and (f) legitimate interests.

      Data is stored as long as necessary for stated purposes, legal obligations, or valid consent. Upon termination, data is permanently deleted or anonymised.

      4. Data Sharing

      To fulfill obligations, we may transfer data to cooperation partners and processors (accountants, payment providers). Payment processing is provided by Stripe, Apple Pay, Google Pay. Data may be transferred to government authorities when legally required.

      5. Your Rights

      Under GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data and receive copies; request correction of inaccurate data; request deletion ("right to be forgotten"); withdraw consent; restrict processing; data portability; and contact the Data State Inspectorate.

      Submit requests at Dzelzavas street 117, Riga, LV-1021, or via email to info@optimistic.lv.

      6. Final Provisions

      This policy complies with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable laws of the Republic of Latvia and the European Union. The Data Controller may update this policy at any time; changes take effect upon posting at www.optimistic.lv.

      Terms & Conditions

      Optimistic / SIA Futech · Effective: January 2026

      End User License Agreement

      This is an agreement between you and SIA Futech ("Optimistic"). By using the Optimistic software, web portal, data, and documentation ("the System"), you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, you may not use the System.

      The Licensed System

      Copyright laws protect the entire System, including software, documentation, data mining algorithms, screen displays, and reports. You have no ownership rights in the System. You have a license to use the System as long as this agreement remains in effect.

      Permitted Use

      A valid license permits you to use the System on a non-exclusive basis for business purposes as set forth in this agreement. Any output provided to third parties must include the copyright notice: "Copyright \u00a9 Optimistic / SIA Futech. All rights reserved."

      You may not remove, alter, or conceal any copyright or trademark notices. All trademarks, trade names, service marks, and copyrights remain the sole property of Optimistic.

      Prohibitions

      You may not: sell or reproduce the System or its output for sale; combine the System interactively with other software without license; modify, reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the System; permit third-party use or operate a service bureau; copy the System or accompanying materials; use the System for malicious purposes or in any unlawful manner.

      Optimistic remains the sole owner of all software, analytics, and reports generated from vehicles using Optimistic.

      Data Ownership & Privacy

      Vehicle and route data processed through the System is governed by our Privacy Policy. We do not share account information with third parties unless explicitly permitted by you.

      Reviews & Content

      Users may post factually correct reviews about Optimistic. Users may not reproduce screenshots of the user interface without permission. Optimistic reserves the right to remove inappropriate content and terminate accounts for factually incorrect reviews.

      Limitation of Liability

      Optimistic offers no assurance that use of the System under this EULA will not violate any law or regulation applicable to you. All rights not specifically granted are reserved by Optimistic / SIA Futech.

      🍪

      We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse site traffic. You can accept all cookies or choose only essential ones.

      Cookie Policy

      Optimistic / SIA Futech · 2026

      What are cookies?

      Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and improve your experience.

      Essential cookies

      themeStores dark/light mode preferencelocalStoragePermanent
      ck_consentStores your cookie preferencelocalStorage1 year
      curLangStores selected languageSessionSession

      These cookies are necessary for the website to function. They cannot be disabled.

      Analytics cookies

      _ga, _ga_*Google Analytics 4 — anonymous usage statisticsCookie2 years
      _gidGoogle Analytics — session identifierCookie24 hours

      These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the site. Data is anonymised and used solely to improve our service. They are loaded only if you click "Accept all".

      Third-party services

      Google Fonts — loaded for typography. Formspree — processes contact form submissions. These services may set their own cookies according to their privacy policies.

      Managing cookies

      You can change your preference at any time by clicking "Cookies" in the footer. You can also clear cookies through your browser settings.
